summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairFare iteration 2 with all new features. Successfully verified auto-location detection setup, Best Price badge functionality, Refresh Prices button, enhanced price variance (±8-12%), Weekend Ride save/load with localStorage, toast notifications, and full PWA support with service worker registration. All backend APIs working with proper price variance simulation and deep link coordinate parameters.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Compare rides with coordinates - proper Uber/Lyft estimates returned
Compare rides without coordinates - uses default coordinates correctly
Invalid data handling - returns proper 422 validation error
Status check creation and retrieval working
Price variance confirmed - ±8-12% variation between API calls
Deep links include proper pickup/destination coordinates
Frontend app loading with correct FairFare title and subtitle
Auto-location detection setup (geolocation API integration ready)
Pickup and destination input functionality working
GPS location detection button clickable
Weekend Ride save functionality - stores route in localStorage
Weekend Ride load button appears after saving route
Weekend Ride load functionality - restores saved route correctly
Toast notifications working for save/load/refresh actions
Compare rides button triggers API call successfully
Results view displays Uber and Lyft cards with prices and wait times
Best Price badge appears on cheaper option (green badge)
Best Price calculation compares average prices correctly
Refresh Prices button exists on results screen
Refresh Prices updates estimates without returning to input screen
Price variance confirmed in frontend - prices change between refreshes
Deep link buttons present for both Uber and Lyft
Back button navigation working correctly
Service Worker registration working (console logs confirm)
PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json
Manifest has proper display mode (standalone) and all required fields
PWA icons, theme colors, and background colors configured correctly
Mobile-first responsive design maintained
iOS-style design compliance with proper colors and spacing

success_percentage.backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed including new price variance test)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all new features working: auto-location setup, Best Price badge, Refresh button, Weekend Ride, toast notifications)
success_percentage.pwa: 100% (service worker registration and manifest fully functional)
